title: RAG Quality Fix List — 10 Targeted Remediations

tasks.description: Fix per_doc_chunk_cap default from 2 to 5 in backend/app/config.py line 204. FR-002.
Fix max_distance_threshold default from 1.0 to 0.5 in backend/app/config.py line 51. FR-008.
Disable query transformation by default: set query_transformation_enabled=False and hyde_enabled=False. Update tests. FR-009.
Change document_parsing_strategy default from 'fast' to 'auto'. FR-010.
Remove sort_key function and expanded_sources.sort in document_retrieval.py. FR-001.
Fix exact-match promotion to rank 1. FR-005.
Wire hybrid_alpha into rrf_fuse at vector_store.py line 574. FR-006.
Wire hybrid_alpha into rrf_fuse at vector_store.py line 801. FR-006.
Contextual chunking: store context in metadata. FR-003.
Prompt builder: surface contextual_context in header. FR-004.
Context distiller: gate synthesis to NO_MATCH only. FR-007.
Amend prompt_builder.py line 185: change ctx_note[:120] to ctx_note[:200] for 200-char truncation per user decision. Update task 3.2 acceptance.
Run full test suite: pytest backend/tests/ -v --tb=short. Verify all existing tests pass. SC-011, SC-012.
Verify telemetry and logging: spot-check 3 key log paths.
